Class PieChartStrategy

java.lang.Object
view.PieChartStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
ChartStrategy
public class PieChartStrategy extends Object implements ChartStrategy
A concrete implementation of the ChartStrategy interface that generates a Pie Chart using the XChart library. * This strategy groups transactions by their category and sums up the total amount spent in each category to render the visualization.

    JPanel
    getChartPanel(List<Transaction> transactions)
    Groups the provided transactions by category, calculates the total cost per category, and builds an XChart PieChart.

  • Method Details

    • getChartPanel

      public JPanel getChartPanel(List<Transaction> transactions)
      Groups the provided transactions by category, calculates the total cost per category, and builds an XChart PieChart. * @param transactions The filtered list of transactions to visualize.
      Specified by:
      getChartPanel in interface ChartStrategy
      Returns:
      An XChartPanel wrapping the generated PieChart for Swing integration.
